name: Black Forest Cake Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1-3/4 cups sifted cake flour (1 cup granulated sugar, 3/4 tsp baking soda, and 1 tsp salt)
2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, finely chopped and melted
Cherry filling: 1 lb 4 oz can of pitted tart cherries, drained; 1/2 cup port wine; 1 tablespoon kirsch; 3 drops almond extract
Chocolate Mousse: 3 ounces semi-sweet chocolate, finely chopped; 1 tablespoon kirsch; heavy cream; sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
2. Gradually add 1/2 cup granulated sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
3. Sift together 1-3/4 cups sifted cake flour and mix into the egg white mixture.
4. Add 1/3 cup oil and 1/2 cup milk; beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
5. Scrape bowl often.
6. Add 1/2 cup milk (divided), 2 egg yolks, and melted chocolate to the batter.
7. Beat until smooth.
8. Fold in remaining egg whites until just combined.
9. Pour batter into two greased and lightly floured 9-inch round pans.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
11. Cool cakes for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool thoroughly.
12. Split each layer in half to create four thin layers; set aside.
1. Combine cherries, port wine, kirsch, and almond extract in a bowl. Chill for 3-4 hours or overnight.
2. For chocolate mousse: Melt chocolate and kirsch in the top of a double boiler over boiling water until smooth. Stir into well-beaten egg mixture. Whip heavy cream and sugar; fold into chocolate mixture. Chill for 2 hours.
1. Prepare your favorite buttercream frosting.
2. Assemble:
- Spread half the buttercream on one cake layer's cut side.
- Form a ridge 1-inch wide and 3/4-inch high around the outside edge with remaining frosting.
- Create another ridge 2 inches from the outer edge.
- Chill for 30 minutes.
- Fill spaces with cherry filling.
- Spread second layer with chocolate mousse, place atop the first layer, chill for 30 minutes.
- Whip cream and sugar; spread third layer with whipped mixture, place atop previous layer.
- Top with fourth layer of cake. Reserve some frosting for sides.
- Sift confectioners' sugar over top and garnish with whipped cream dollops, maraschino cherries, and chocolate curls. Chill for 2 hours.
